title: High-density mixed mastery
description: All character classes — letters, digits, symbols at near-final speed
text: Release v3.2.1 ships at 14:00 UTC on 2026-06-30, addressing 47 issues (+820 / -340 lines). Coverage: 92%. Performance gain: ~18% on P95 latency. Contributors: Anna, David, Lisa, Mark. CI status: GREEN ✓. Tag pushed to https://github.com/example/repo. Next milestone: v4.0 scheduled for Q4 2026.

tips.text: Every key, every kind of character, at 98 a minute. The messy real stuff.
Clear this and the final is well within reach. Treat it as a dress rehearsal.

tips.text: Real work looks like this: numbers, tags, symbols, all crowded together. Don't flinch at it.

tips.target: P95 latency. Contributors: Anna, David, Lisa, Mark. CI status: GREEN ✓. Tag pushed to https://github.com/example/repo. Next milestone: v4.0 scheduled for Q4 2026.

character_tips.anna: The densest copy in the course. Every character class, at full working speed.
character_tips.maxim: People who write release notes and logs all day type exactly this. You're keeping their pace.
character_tips.knopych: The whole keyboard at once. By now nothing on it is a stranger.
character_tips.klavochka: Letters, numbers, symbols, all in one line. You know them all by name; type them like old colleagues.
